notes: The checked-in live capture uses a merchant-realistic draftOrderCreate request with customer linkage, custom and variant line items, shipping line, discounts, tax/reserve fields, custom attributes, and paymentTerms selected; with the refreshed read_payment_terms grant Shopify now returns the field as a readable null because the draft has no payment terms set. The scenario replays captured variables and compares the complete selected DraftOrder payload. Shopify-generated IDs, draft order names, and invoice URLs are path-scoped expected differences.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy creates a stable synthetic draft order ID while the capture contains the live Shopify draft order ID.
Shopify allocates draft order names from store state; local staging uses a deterministic synthetic sequence.
Invoice URLs are generated per draft order by Shopify and locally synthesized by the proxy.
The proxy creates stable synthetic draft order line item IDs while the capture contains live Shopify IDs.
